name: Three Pepper Beef Kabobs
recipeIngredient: 1 medium bell pepper, cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the beef steak into 1-inch pieces.
2. In a large bowl, whisk together the marinade ingredients: vegetable oil, lemon juice, water, Dijon-style mustard, honey, dried oregano leaves, and pepper.
3. Add the beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms to the bowl; toss to coat evenly with the marinade.
4. Alternately thread pieces of beef, bell pepper, and mushrooms onto each of four 12-inch metal skewers.
5. Place the kabobs on a rack in a broiler pan so that the meat surface is 3 to 4 inches from the heat source.
6. Broil for 8 to 10 minutes, turning occasionally, until the desired doneness (medium rare to medium) is reached.
7. Season with salt, if desired.
Makes 4 servings
